_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: SA Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: SA Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

must_detect.matched_text: For general market guidance you may call the public securities regulator helpline at 800-123-0000; do not share your passwords over the phone.

Sahara Dunes Holdings CJSC (CR 1010000009, invalid) — PDPL Privacy Notice and Issuer Data Processing Addendum.
This notice applies to processing in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia for issuer workflows under the securities regulator’s market-conduct framework and the national exchange’s disclosure rules.
Categories of data we may process include corporate identifiers and limited personal identifiers for KYC/AGM access; examples: [Full Name], [Registered Address], [Mobile], [Email], [IBAN], [Passport No.], [National ID], [Iqama No.], [Tax No.].
One example of a local identifier collected for verification is National ID 1012345671 (format plausible, checksum intentionally invalid) when a shareholder requests meeting access.
We do not request personal brokerage account numbers, trading passwords, or biometric templates via this channel.
Any references to “MNPI” herein relate to internal issuer rooms; such information is not shared with processors until after announcement on the national securities exchange (see prior public notice dated 1445/05/01H).
Cross-border transfers are limited and recorded in the Data Authority transfer register; where applicable we use model contractual clauses and transfer impact assessments consistent with PDPL.
Processors may include cloud providers hosting in-Kingdom zones; routine support tickets redact direct identifiers and use placeholder tokens like [NATIONAL_ID] and [CONTACT_PHONE].
If you submit a DSAR, please use the form fields [National ID], [Date of Birth], and [Contact Email] only; attachments with scanned cards will be deleted.
For general market guidance you may call the public securities regulator helpline at 800-123-0000; do not share your passwords over the phone.
